automatedDemo.retainedArtifacts: four refreshed inline demo data sources plus sanitized verification summary; checked-in SQLite fixtures must be synthetic only
automatedDemo.scenario: live datasource-sync observation across projects, incidents, customers, and a 500-row activity data source, each demonstrated as its own database-ID-named <database-id>.sqlite artifact with auto-discovered schema_properties/rows surfaces, realistic property data, paginated query, NotionMD body observation, and bounded reruns

syntheticReplica.description: deterministic public replica/API SQLite fixture generated from the fake datasource-sync harness; contains no live Notion data
